noticias.summary_fallback: News available at the original source.

BRA.ARG: El Clásico of the Americas, the biggest rivalry in South American football.
BRA.URU: The pain of the Maracanazo (1950) still echoes in Brazilian memory.
BRA.GER: The 7-1 in the 2014 World Cup semifinal is the defining chapter of this rivalry.

ARG.BRA: El Clásico of the Americas carries decades of intense rivalry.
ARG.ENG: The Hand of God (1986) and the Falklands war make this duel unique.
ARG.URU: Clásico del Río de la Plata, the oldest derby in the Americas.

GER.NED: The 1974 final opened one of Europe's greatest football rivalries.
GER.ENG: 1966, 1990 and 1996 shaped half a century of decisive meetings.
GER.BRA: The 7-1 in 2014 became the most symbolic match in this rivalry.

FRA.GER: The 1982 semifinal is one of the most controversial matches in World Cup history.
FRA.ARG: The 2022 final is considered by many the greatest final ever.
FRA.POR: World Cup and Euro semifinals strengthened this growing Latin rivalry.

ENG.ARG: The Hand of God in 1986 created one of sport's most controversial rivalries.
ENG.GER: 1966, 1990 and 1996 cemented this clash between European giants.
ENG.URU: The 1954 defeat marked the beginning of a transatlantic classic.

ESP.POR: The Iberian Derby pits historic neighbors against each other.
ESP.NED: The 2010 final was physical, controversial and defining for Spain.
ESP.GER: It is a recurring clash between powers of major European tournaments.

ITA.BRA: The 1970 and 1994 finals linked two football superpowers forever.
ITA.FRA: The 2006 final and Zidane's headbutt made this duel unforgettable.
ITA.URU: The 1930 final sits at the origin of this historic rivalry.

URU.BRA: The Maracanazo in 1950 remains Uruguay's most famous football victory.
URU.ARG: Clásico del Río de la Plata, one of the oldest rivalries in world football.
URU.ITA: The 1930 final gave Uruguay its first world title.

NED.GER: The 1974 final and Europe's historical weight make this rivalry special.
NED.ESP: The rematch to the 2010 final never came, but the tension remains.
NED.ARG: Showdowns in 1974 and 2022 kept this rivalry alive.

POR.ESP: The Iberian Derby blends shared language, proximity and rivalry.
POR.FRA: Recent semifinals and star-filled generations keep this duel hot.
POR.ENG: The 2006 quarterfinal remains the most memorable chapter of this matchup.
